structured_output.summary: The plan's core design (persisted final_transcription.status as the single source of truth for list/detail, full-screen overlay for voiceprint preview prep, row-level graying for disabled dictionary entries) is sound and the option matrix rejects the right alternatives. Two gaps should be closed before implementation: the reprocess `failed` state has no defined display mapping, and the voiceprint overlay dismissal via `loadedmetadata`/`error` events risks a permanent full-screen lockout if the event fires before the listener attaches. No MUST_FIX; plan is otherwise implementable within the stated scope.

findings.title: Reprocess `failed` state has no display mapping
findings.evidence: plan.md item 4 and 完了条件 only define queued/running→「処理中」 and success→「完了」; no branch for final_transcription.status=failed is specified anywhere in plan.md or the verification contract test list.
findings.recommendation: Define the failed-state label (e.g., 「失敗」 or error badge) in the shared status display and add a test case, so a failed reprocess doesn't leave a permanent 「処理中」 or a misleading 「完了」.

findings.title: Voiceprint overlay can lock permanently on missed loadedmetadata
findings.evidence: research-brief.md hypothesis B relies on `loadedmetadata` (or error) as the sole release condition for a full-screen blocking overlay; if the audio element reaches readyState >= HAVE_METADATA before the listener attaches, neither event fires again.
findings.recommendation: Check `audio.readyState >= 1` when attaching the listener and release immediately if already loaded, plus add a timeout fallback (e.g., 10s) that dismisses the overlay with an error message so users are never hard-locked.

findings.title: No refresh path from stale 「処理中」 to 「完了」 in the list
findings.evidence: plan.md item 6 ensures the list shows 「処理中」 after returning, but no polling/refetch mechanism is specified for the list or detail to transition to 「完了」 when the job finishes.
findings.recommendation: Specify the update mechanism (existing polling, refetch-on-focus, or explicit manual refresh as accepted behavior) and note it in the plan so 完了条件 'success後は「完了」と表示' is testably achievable without ambiguity.

findings.title: Optimistic update may flicker if resync response is stale
findings.evidence: plan.md item 5 optimistically sets 「処理中」 then re-syncs with API meeting data; a resync racing the queued commit could briefly revert the badge to 「完了」.
findings.recommendation: Prefer the reprocess POST response (which reflects the committed queued status per hypothesis C) as the resync source, or guard the resync to not downgrade queued/running to completed within the same interaction.

findings.title: Verification contract hardcodes machine-specific absolute paths
findings.evidence: verification-contract.md commands embed `/Users/bonginkan-3-gouki/...` venv and worktree paths, coupling verification to one machine.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable for local pipeline use, but consider relative paths or env vars if this contract must be reproducible by other agents/machines.

local_verification: cd services/dashboard && npm test -- tests/test_transcription_dictionary_ui.test.ts tests/test_dashboard_brand.test.ts tests/test_voiceprint_recording_ui.test.ts tests/test_meeting_status_display.test.ts tests/test_transcript_reprocess_ui.test.ts
Inspect services/meeting-api/meeting_api/meetings.py to confirm reprocess failure writes final_transcription.status=failed (validates F1 mapping need)
Inspect services/dashboard/src/app/voiceprints/page.tsx to confirm listener attach order vs. src assignment on the preview audio element (validates F2)
